ew_context: Silver breaking above key resistance suggests completion of corrective phase and potential start of impulsive wave higher
pattern_desc: Clean breakout above well-tested resistance at 76.08 level with 5 prior touches. Price action shows momentum acceleration with RSI at 80%
invalidation: Close back below 76.08 key level on H1 timeframe would negate the breakout
market_context: Iran ceasefire reduces safe-haven demand for precious metals, but silver maintains technical strength amid broader risk-on sentiment
